prompt: Create a cinematic sports advertising poster featuring a giant close-up running shoe in motion splashing through shallow water on a wet city street at sunset. The composition is a low-angle, ultra-dynamic action shot with 1 primary shoe dominating the right half of the frame and 1 secondary blurred shoe visible behind it, implying a runner mid-stride. The hero sneaker is a white and gray knit performance shoe with a black side swoosh-style logo, gray laces, small red lace-loop accents, a thick translucent cushioned sole, and a bright orange-red outsole glow along the bottom edge. Show the shoe covered in realistic water droplets and sharp texture detail, with explosive splash particles frozen around the sole. The runner wears dark athletic leggings, visible only from the lower legs down. Place a dramatic urban skyline in the distant background on the right, softly blurred, under stormy dark clouds breaking into warm golden sunlight near the horizon. Use intense contrast between cool blue-gray shadows and fiery orange highlights, with glossy reflections on the rain-soaked pavement. On the left side, add 3 text elements arranged vertically: a huge bold distressed white uppercase headline reading JUST DO IT., beneath it 1 white swoosh-style brand mark, and below that a smaller uppercase orange motivational line reading YOU CAN'T STOP WHAT'S ALREADY INSIDE YOU.. Include visible branding on the tongue label with NIKE. Make it look like a premium high-impact commercial poster for running shoes, with hyperreal detail, dramatic lighting, shallow depth of field, motion energy, crisp typography, ad-photography polish, and a widescreen 16:9 layout.
